text.title: Solo Late-Fee Clause Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: jurisdiction review → fill clause → attach to SOW → invoke when overdue → annual update.

step.name: jurisdiction-review
step.action: Engage local lawyer to review base clause; obtain signed memo. Store at `jurisdiction_review.memo_link`.
step.decision-gate: If jurisdiction prohibits late fees, skip methodology; use dunning sequence only.

step.name: fill-clause
step.input: Reviewed template + standard tier-schedule + re-engagement fee

step.name: attach-to-sow
step.action: Paste `clause_text` into SOW. Version control. Client signs the SOW that includes clause; no email-only delivery.

step.name: invoke-when-overdue
step.action: Run `assess-overdue` per invoice. At each tier threshold, apply late fee. At pause_days, run `pause-notification` (5-business-day notice). On payment, charge `re_engagement_fee_usd` before resuming.
step.output: Late fees billed; pause notification sent OR work resumed with fee paid

step.name: annual-update
step.input: Last year usage + new jurisdiction memos + dunning data
step.action: Increment version. Re-review memo annually (or sooner if regulation changes). Update tiers if collection data suggests stronger/weaker thresholds.
